title: Brooksville Half-Acre Land Clearing | Breaking Ground
h1: Heavily Wooded Half-Acre Clearing in Brooksville
meta: Before-and-after land clearing of a heavily wooded half-acre lot in Brooksville, FL by Breaking Ground Land Services and Demolition.

challenge: Heavy vegetation density and limited access required careful sequencing of cutting, grubbing, and haul-off.

title: Lakeland Stump Excavation Project | Breaking Ground

challenge: Deep root mass near landscaping required controlled excavation and backfill.

meta: Storm debris removal and post-hurricane property cleanup across Central Florida by Breaking Ground.
